CREATE TABLE test_concat (id UInt32, str1 String, str2 String, str3 String);
SELECT concatWithSeparator('-', str1, str2, str3) FROM test_concat WHERE id = 1;
SELECT concatWithSeparator(',', str1, str2, str3) FROM test_concat WHERE id = 2;
SELECT concatWithSeparator('|', 'Join', (SELECT str1 FROM test_concat WHERE id = 3), str3) FROM test_concat;
SELECT concatWithSeparator(' ', str1, (SELECT str2 FROM test_concat WHERE id = 4), str3) FROM test_concat WHERE id = 2;
SELECT concatWithSeparator('::', str1, str2, 'StaticString') FROM (SELECT str1, str2 FROM test_concat) AS t;
SELECT concatWithSeparator(',', str1, str2) AS concatenated_value FROM test_concat WHERE id > 0;
SELECT concatWithSeparator('-', (SELECT str1 FROM test_concat WHERE id = 5), (SELECT str2 FROM test_concat WHERE id = 4));
SELECT concatWithSeparator('', str1, str2) FROM test_concat WHERE id = 1;
SELECT concatWithSeparator(',', str1, str2, (SELECT 'Subquery' AS sub_str) FROM test_concat WHERE id = 2) FROM test_concat;
SELECT concatWithSeparator(';', (SELECT str1 FROM test_concat WHERE id = 3), (SELECT str2 FROM test_concat WHERE id = 4), (SELECT 'Constant' AS const_str));
